THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LEON, CARLOS BRAN, THELMA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1449 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE #2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-02-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF WAIVES UNPAID RENT AND DAMAGES THRU 6-1-97. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & FEES. MUTUAL RELEASE. PLTF TO RETAIN ANY SECURITY DEPOSITS, LAST MONTH'S RENT, OR ANY INTEREST THEREON. PLTF ENTITLED TO CHANGE GARAGE DOOR LOCKS & SHALL PROVIDE DEFTS WITH ACCESS. SEE JUDGMNT.
